name:
I'm on a ridge above a narrow ravine I see
mountains in the distance
description:
I'm on a ridge above a narrow ravine I see
mountains in the distance
hints: A ridge above a ravine. The ravine is full of sagebrush and impassable.
You need to clear the ravine first. BURN the sagebrush with matches.
BURN clears the ravine so you can GO RAVI to enter. JUMP RAVI jumps across to the other side.
BURN with matches clears brush (needs matches). Then GO RAVI to mine entrance (10). JUMP RAVI crosses to ridge (18). N=fork (7).

effects: Message: its full of sage brush, tumbleweed & is impassable
Message: The dry wash is burnt clear

notes: Ridge above ravine. BURN sagebrush with matches to clear path, then GO RAVI to mine area (10). JUMP RAVI crosses to opposite ridge (18). N=fork (7).
